secret.recovery_code_likely: This looks like an account recovery code, not a TOTP secret. Enter the Base32 setup key from the website (letters A–Z and digits 2–7 only; not 0, 1, 8, or 9).
secret.recovery_code_wrong_count: Recovery-code segment count or length does not match common formats (often 8×4 or 5×5). This field requires a Base32 TOTP secret.
secret.hex_likely: This looks like a hexadecimal key. Only Base32 is supported (letters A–Z and digits 2–7).
secret.base32_invalid: Not a valid Base32 secret. Use the setup key from the website (A–Z, 2–7; spaces or hyphens are OK).
secret.base32_too_short: Base32 secret is too short (at least {0} characters after normalization).
secret.base32_empty: Secret is too short to decode into key bytes.
